skills.title: Install chrome extensions by category rating
skills.when: When the user wants to find and install one or more Chrome extensions from a particular category (Shopping, Entertainment, Games, Travel, Tools, etc.) based on rating criteria, typically requesting the…
steps: Navigate to the Chrome Web Store
Filter extensions by the target category
Sort extensions by rating
Select and install the target extension(s)
Repeat installation for additional extensions if needed
Optionally bookmark extension pages
skills.pitfall: Clicking the wrong category tile in the sidebar

skills.title: Customize chrome profile
skills.when: When the user wants to personalize their Chrome browser profile by changing username, theme color, and/or avatar icon.
steps: Navigate to profile customization settings
Change profile username to desired name
Select theme color from color picker
Select avatar icon from avatar grid
skills.pitfall: Avatar selection requires precise click coordinates; missing the target may navigate to unrelated settings

skills.title: Clear chrome browsing data
skills.when: When the user wants to delete browsing history, cookies, cache, passwords, autofill data, or other site data from Chrome for privacy, cleanup, or troubleshooting purposes. Use for both comprehensive 'all time'…
steps: Open Chrome's main menu
Navigate to the Delete browsing data dialog
Switch to Advanced tab if comprehensive data deletion is needed
Set the time range for data deletion
Select data types for deletion
Execute the data deletion
Verify deletion success (optional)
skills.pitfall: Always verify and set the time range explicitly — the default may be 'Last hour' which would miss older data when 'All time' is intended

skills.title: Calc apply custom number format
skills.when: When you need to format numeric cells with specific display patterns: custom suffixes/prefixes, decimal places, thousand separators, scientific notation, locale-specific separators, or scaling…
steps: Identify the target range and required format pattern
Apply the format using the most reliable method
Verify the format matches the requirement exactly
skills.pitfall: Using '0' instead of '#,##0' when thousand separators are required

skills.title: Freeze panes calc
skills.when: When the user needs to keep header rows and/or leading columns visible while scrolling through a spreadsheet in LibreOffice Calc. Applies to freezing the first N rows, first M columns, or both simultaneously.
steps: Ensure the target sheet is active and document is fully loaded
Apply freeze panes with the correct row and column counts
Verify freeze was applied correctly
skills.pitfall: LibreOffice may show a Document Recovery dialog on startup; always handle it before attempting UNO/macro operations

skills.title: Create 3d chart libreoffice calc
skills.when: When the task requires creating a 3D chart (bar, cone, or column) from spreadsheet data in LibreOffice Calc, and optionally customizing chart elements like data series colors, gridlines, legends, data labels,…
steps: Select the data range for the chart
Launch the chart creation wizard
Configure the chart type as 3D
Configure data range and label settings
Configure chart elements (titles, axes, gridlines)
Format specific data series (color, transparency, texture)
Add and configure data labels
Reposition or format the chart legend
Finalize and exit chart editing mode
skills.pitfall: The Finish button in Chart Elements dialog may require multiple clicks to register

skills.title: Format slide titles multi slide
skills.when: When the user requests formatting changes (font size, color, bold, highlighting, effects, spacing, etc.) to be applied to title text on multiple specific slides in a presentation.
steps: Navigate to the first target slide
Select the title text on the current slide
Apply the requested formatting changes to the selected title
Navigate to the next target slide and repeat formatting
Save the presentation to persist changes
skills.pitfall: Single clicks on title text may fail to select it; dragging from end to beginning or triple-clicking is more reliable

skills.title: Impress format title text
skills.when: When the user needs to change font size, color, bold, underline, or alignment of a slide title in LibreOffice Impress. Applies to single or multiple slides.
steps: Identify target slide(s) and title placeholder or shape name
Apply font properties (bold, size, underline) to title
Apply text color to title
Apply paragraph alignment to title
Apply formatting to all text on a slide (if scope is slide-wide)
skills.pitfall: Use separate UNO API calls for each property (color via impress_set_text_color, font properties via impress_set_font, alignment via…

skills.title: Impress format text elements
skills.when: When the user needs to change visual properties of text elements such as font size, font family, color, bold/italic styling, borders, or alignment within a presentation.
steps: Open the target presentation and navigate to the relevant slide
Select the text element to format
Apply font family and size changes
Apply text styling (bold, italic, color)
Apply alignment formatting
Apply border or fill formatting to text box
Save the presentation
skills.pitfall: Ensure the correct text element is selected before changing properties to avoid modifying the wrong element

skills.title: Writer paragraph spacing formatting
skills.when: When the user needs to set line spacing (single, 1.5, double, or custom) and/or paragraph indentation (left, right, first-line) on specific paragraphs or the entire document in LibreOffice Writer.
steps: Identify target paragraphs by index or selection scope
Apply line spacing to target paragraphs
Apply font size to target paragraphs (if required)
Apply indentation settings (if required)
Insert paragraph breaks to separate sentences (if required)
Save the document to persist changes
skills.pitfall: For double line spacing via UNO, set ParaLineSpacing.Height=200 (not 200% — the value 200 means 200% proportional spacing) and Mode=PROPORTIONAL

skills.title: Format writer document text
skills.when: When the task requires opening a Writer document and applying text formatting such as font changes, styling (bold/italic/underline), alignment, line spacing, text case conversion, or color changes to specific…
steps: Open the target document in LibreOffice Writer
Navigate to and select the target text range
Apply font and text styling changes
Apply paragraph-level formatting
Clear existing formatting if needed
Save the document to preserve changes
skills.pitfall: Clicking font size dropdown instead of font family dropdown when changing fonts

skills.title: Format writer document text and lists
skills.when: When the task requires opening a LibreOffice Writer document and applying multiple formatting operations including text styling (color, font effects, alignment), list type conversion (numbered ↔ bulleted,…
steps: Open the target document from the specified folder
Select the target text or list for formatting
Apply text case and font style formatting
Apply text alignment formatting
Apply special character formatting (superscript, strikethrough, underline styles)
Convert list type and apply custom bullet/numbering style
Apply highlighting and advanced text decoration
Apply paragraph-level formatting (line spacing, font size)
Save the modified document
skills.pitfall: Clicking near the Bold button may accidentally open line styles dropdown instead of applying bold

skills.title: Gimp color adjustment with blending
skills.when: When the user wants to open an image in GIMP and apply a color or tonal adjustment (brightness/contrast, curves, threshold, posterize, color to alpha) with specific blending mode and opacity settings.
steps: Launch GIMP application
Open the target image file
Access the appropriate color adjustment tool
Configure the adjustment parameters
Configure blending mode to Normal
Set the opacity to the desired percentage
Apply the changes
Change foreground color if requested
skills.pitfall: Forgetting to change blending mode from default (often 'Replace') to 'Normal'

skills.title: Vlc video screenshot gimp edit
skills.when: When you need to capture a frame from a video in VLC media player and then apply image processing effects in GIMP (blur, noise, desaturation, text overlay, etc.)
steps: Locate and open the target video file in VLC
Play video and pause at the desired frame
Capture screenshot using VLC's snapshot feature
Open the captured screenshot in GIMP
Apply the required image processing effects
Save or export the processed image
skills.pitfall: Clicking File menu in GIMP may fail to open dropdown; keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+O, Ctrl+Shift+E) are more reliable

skills.title: Gimp adjust color properties
skills.when: When the user requests to enhance, reduce, or adjust color vibrancy, saturation, brightness, or contrast of an image in GIMP. The image is already open in GIMP.
steps: Open the Colors menu in GIMP
Open the appropriate adjustment dialog
Adjust the target property using the dialog controls
Apply the changes and close the dialog
skills.pitfall: Dragging sliders in GIMP dialogs is imprecise for exact values

skills.title: Filter media by genre and sort
skills.when: When the user wants to browse movies or TV shows filtered by a specific genre (especially comedy) and sorted by user ratings or audience scores on a streaming/media review site.
steps: Navigate to the target media section (Movies or TV Shows)
Reveal or access filtering options
Apply platform/streaming service filter (if needed)
Select the target genre to filter results
Confirm genre selection (if required)
Sort the filtered list by rating or score
skills.pitfall: Genre selection may require explicit confirmation via APPLY button

skills.title: Lookup order status by number and email
skills.when: When the user needs to check the status or details of an existing order by providing an order number and the email address used during purchase. Applicable across e-commerce sites that offer guest order…
steps: Navigate to the order lookup or order status page
Enter the order number into the designated input field
Enter the associated email address for verification
Submit the form to retrieve order details
skills.pitfall: Entering order number or email with typos or extra spaces

skills.title: Thunderbird message filter forward
skills.when: When the user needs to set up automatic forwarding of incoming emails from one account to another address using Thunderbird's local message filters.
steps: Open the Message Filters dialog
Create new filter
Configure filter to match all messages
Set forward action
Enter forwarding address and save
skills.pitfall: Do not write Thunderbird config files (msgFilterRules.dat) via CLI while Thunderbird is running — use the GUI

skills.title: Thunderbird remove account
skills.when: When the user needs to delete an email account from Thunderbird, removing all local data and configuration for that account.
steps: Launch Thunderbird Mail application
Open Account Settings
Access Account Actions menu
Select remove account option
Confirm account removal
skills.pitfall: After launching Thunderbird, wait for the UI to fully load before attempting to click Account Settings

skills.title: Search hotels by price
skills.when: When the user needs to find hotel accommodations in a specific city for given dates and guest count, prioritizing the lowest available price. Applies to travel booking sites where the workflow involves…
steps: Navigate to hotel search interface
Enter destination city
Set check-in and check-out dates
Configure guest count
Execute the hotel search
Sort results by lowest price
Apply additional filters if specified
Select the target hotel
skills.pitfall: Default sorting is 'Recommended' or 'Featured', not 'Lowest Price'

skills.title: Customize vscode themes
skills.when: When the user wants to change the visual appearance of VS Code by selecting different color themes, file icon themes, or product icon themes. This includes switching between multiple themes in sequence or…
steps: Open the settings menu to access theme options
Navigate to the Themes submenu
Select and apply the desired color theme
Select and apply the desired file icon theme (if required)
Select and apply the desired product icon theme (if required)
Apply multiple theme changes in sequence (if required)
skills.pitfall: Confusing the settings gear icon with the account icon or remote connections icon in the bottom left corner

skills.title: Retrieve airline booking by reference and name
skills.when: When the user needs to look up, view, modify, or check the status of an existing airline reservation or trip using a booking reference/confirmation number and passenger last name.
steps: Navigate to the booking lookup section
Enter the booking reference or ticket number
Enter the passenger's last name
Submit the search to retrieve booking details
skills.pitfall: The last name input field may be hidden within a dropdown container and requires clicking to expand before typing

skills.title: Research stock data multiple companies
skills.when: When the user requests current stock prices, financial metrics (P/E ratio, market cap), or historical price charts for multiple publicly traded companies. Typically involves multiple companies and requires…
steps: Launch web browser to access Google Search
For each target company: search for stock data and view requested chart timeframe
Repeat search and chart viewing for all remaining companies
Verify all requested companies and data points are collected
skills.pitfall: Clicking navigation tabs (Images, Videos) or upper navigation elements (Search Labs) instead of search bar or chart controls

skills.title: Search adoptable pets with filters
skills.when: When the user needs to find adoptable pets (typically dogs) matching specific criteria like location, breed, age, gender, color, or care source. Use this for any pet adoption search that requires applying…
steps: Navigate to the pet search interface
Set the search location using the target zip code
Apply breed filter if a specific breed is required
Apply age/life stage filter
Execute the initial search to load results and access additional filters
Dismiss any obstructing overlays or pop-ups
Apply additional filters on the results page
Review results and select a matching pet profile
skills.pitfall: Pop-up overlays can obstruct the results page and filter controls

skills.title: Search and filter hotel bookings
skills.when: When the user needs to find hotel accommodations matching specific criteria including destination, dates, guest configuration, star rating, amenities, location preferences, and price constraints. Applicable…
steps: Navigate to the hotel booking interface
Set destination and dates
Configure guest and room requirements
Apply star rating and brand filters
Apply amenity and feature filters
Apply location-based filters
Sort results to find optimal option
Select and initiate booking
skills.pitfall: Default guest count is typically 1-2 adults; must explicitly update to match requirements
